name: §6Turtle
description:
§8Combat Pet

§7Health: §c50
§7Defense: §a+100
§7True Defense: §f+[True Defense]

§6Turtle Tactics
§7Gain §a+30% ❈ Defense §7and an
§7additional §a+10% ❈ Defense §7when
§7standing still.

§6Genius Amniote
§7Grants §a+30% ❈ Defense §7to 4
§7players within 50 blocks of you.

§6Unflippable
§7Gain §aimmunity §7to knockback

§6Turtle Shell
§7When under §c40% §7maximum HP, you take
§a25% §7less damage. Gain §4+?♨
§4Vitality §7for 15 seconds after taking
§710 hits.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

§6§lLEGENDARY

variants.name: Ancient Turtle Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§aTurtle§7 pets.

§aThis skin is animated!

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
